attention3.ptxt: Check the following conditions before parking brake inspection and adjustment.

item.ptxt: No air is trapped in brake system.
Rear brake pad are not worn beyond limit.

attention3.ptxt: Brake warning light should be checked when ignition is “ON”.

item.ptxt: With parking brake lever pulled up, inspect the following items. If check result is not OK, adjust or replace parking brake cable.
Operation of parking brake lever is smooth.
Operate parking brake lever with force of 200 N (20.4 kgf, 45.0 lbf) as shown, counting number of clicks ratchet notches generate.

attention3.ptxt: One click sound corresponds to one notch.

sdm1.sdm-condition: When lever pulled up at 200 N (20.4 kgf, 45.0 lbf)

item.ptxt: Release parking brake lever and make sure brake warning light turns off. Then check that brake warning light turns on within 1 notch when parking brake lever is pulled up. If check result is not OK, check and, if necessary, repair the following items.

attention3.ptxt: Check that ABS warning light is turned off.

item.ptxt: Brake fluid switch (attached to brake master cylinder reservoir)
